name: i3 Verticals, Inc.
summary: PART I Our Company i3 Verticals provides mission-critical enterprise software solutions to public sector entities. These comprehensive cloud-native solutions address a broad range of government functions, including courts and public safety, public administration, utilities, transportation and schools. The Companys mission is to enable state and local governments and related agencies to perform their functions and serve their constituents as effectively and efficiently as possible.
